title: Steam Knight Blaster suppresses equipped creature effects

card.rawText: The equipped creature loses its effect. Replace its base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier with Proto Blast, 3 dice, +3.

effect.value: The equipped creature loses its effect. Replace its base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier with Proto Blast, 3 dice, +3.

plan.title: Steam Knight Blaster suppresses equipped creature effects
